title: Living in Boulder vlog 11 -  6 -  2017: Google Earth Battles until page 14/19

enrichment.summary: Kyle records an early morning vlog from Boulder, updating viewers on his progress superimposing historical battle maps in Google Earth — now on page 14 of 19. He mentions reading a lengthy book about Livy (the Roman historian) and shares plans to eventually make YouTube videos showcasing the completed battle overlays.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Proud of progress, feels like a 'real genius' for how well it's going
Wants to learn more but finds it slow going as a non-native reader
Motivated to finish battles and castles before moving on to new work
